title: Design System: Don Diego Club Residencial

display.purpose: Large narrative and section headlines, used to make the place feel editorial and rooted.

body.purpose: Navigation, labels, forms, paragraphs, and product-like service surfaces.

label.purpose: Short orientation labels only, usually uppercase and between 10px and 11px.

shadows.name: editorial-image-lift
shadows.purpose: Default large media and residential content panel shadow.

shadows.name: clay-form-glow
shadows.purpose: Contact and form panels on warm backgrounds.

shadows.name: map-image-float
shadows.purpose: Small inset videos, maps, and layered image details.

motion.name: editorial-reveal
motion.purpose: Section reveal motion and card stack entrances.

motion.name: drawn-title
motion.purpose: SVG path drawing and heritage title animations.

motion.name: strong-out
motion.purpose: Large hero and page title settles.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Hover, color, active, and simple control transitions.

rules: Color maps to project reality before decoration.
Use imagery as a primary brand carrier.
Keep product-like tools service-oriented and quiet.
Respect reduced motion for animated and scroll-linked interactions.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Rectangular clay call to action for contact and conversion surfaces.
components.css: .ds-primary-cta { background: #AA7D69; color: #FFF9F2; border: 0; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px; font: 700 11px/1.2 'Apercu Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 300ms ease; } .ds-primary-cta:hover { background: #956955; } .ds-primary-cta:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Underlined Field
components.description: Quiet transparent field used in contact forms and newsletter forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; color: #1C1713; font-family: 'Apercu Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field span { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(28,23,19,0.58); } .ds-field input { background: transparent; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(170,125,105,0.3); padding: 12px 0; color: #1C1713; outline: none; } .ds-field input:focus { border-bottom-color: #AA7D69; }

components.name: Environment Carousel Control
components.description: Square image-overlay controls for project environment carousels.
components.css: .ds-carousel-control { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.7); background: rgba(22,18,15,0.24); color: white; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.16); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); transition: background-color 300ms ease, color 300ms ease, transform 300ms ease; } .ds-carousel-control:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.88); color: #222222; } .ds-carousel-control:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Small status label with component-colored dot for project phases.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font: 700 8px/1.2 'Apercu Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(34,34,34,0.6); } .ds-status i { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E1B19B; box-shadow: 0 0 5px 1px rgba(225,177,155,0.5), 0 0 10px 2px rgba(225,177,155,0.27); }

components.name: Editorial Image Panel
components.description: Near-square media surface for manifesto, gallery, map, and component imagery.
components.css: .ds-image-panel { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2px; background: #EDE5DA; box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(47,39,33,0.1); } .ds-image-panel img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Overlay navigation text with a thin active underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; padding: 6px 8px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font: 300 12px/1.2 'Apercu Pro', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color 300ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #FFF3E1; } .ds-nav-link span { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: -4px; width: 0; height: 1px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: currentColor; transition: width 300ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover span { width: 32px; }
